prompt: Create a cover image for an article about FDE delivering a universal agent product. MAIN CONTENT: A central illustration showing 4 customer cards arranged in a 2x2 grid, each card with a different business scenario icon. Surrounded by 3 layered 'base' rectangles in the center (image/gateway/UI) showing the foundation. The 4 customers all point to the central base, showing 'all customers use the same base'. 4 customer scenarios (in 2x2 grid, around the center): Top-left: 律所 (law firm) — small law firm building icon with 合同 paper. Top-right: 培训机构 (training school) — graduation cap icon with 作业 homework. Bottom-left: 连锁餐饮 (chain restaurant) — restaurant building icon with 食 food. Bottom-right: 保险公司 (insurance company) — umbrella/shield icon with 保单 policy. CENTER (3-layer stack): 3 stacked rectangles labeled: 1st (top) '交互定制' (a2ui), 2nd (middle) '资源调度' (gateway), 3rd (bottom) '运行环境' (image). Each layer has a small tech icon. TITLE (overlay at top): 'FDE 怎么交付一个通用 agent 产品' in Chinese, large bold font. SUBTITLE (below title): '4 个客户的 3 次沉淀' in smaller font. BOTTOM BANNER (ribbon): 'FDE 实战记录' with small tags. STYLE: Warm cream paper background (#F5F0E8), black hand-drawn sketch lines (2-3px, slightly irregular), soft pastel brand colors (orange #E8A87C for law, green #85BAA1 for training, blue #7BA7C9 for restaurant, yellow #F5C66B for insurance). Each customer card in a slightly different pastel color. Center stack prominent. Clear visual hierarchy. Minimal Chinese labels, simple line icons. NO dark backgrounds, NO 3D, NO realistic people. Subtle ArchAIHarness watermark bottom right. Landscape composition, 16:9 ratio.

prompt: Create a hand-drawn educational timeline diagram showing how a universal agent product evolved from 4 real customers. TITLE at top: '4 个客户，3 次沉淀' in Chinese. MAIN LAYOUT — A horizontal timeline from left to right with 4 milestones, each with a small 'customer + new layer' icon set. Milestone 1 (LEFT): Customer icon small law firm (3 lawyers), Task tag '读 PDF 抽数据', Layer created NO layer (write a script directly), Text below '第一个客户：写死，能用就行', Timeline date marker 'Day 1-3'. Milestone 2: Customer icon small training company, Task tag '读作文给评分', Layer created Docker image icon 'build-on-vscode-opencode-image', Text below '环境要能跑' + 'seed-if-absent 不覆盖业务', Timeline date marker 'Day 4-10'. Milestone 3: Customer icon chain restaurant (50 stores), Task tag '50 个门店各要一个 AI', Layer created K8s icon 'agent-gateway', Text below '一人一实例 + TTL 回收 + 子域名路由', Timeline date marker 'Day 11-31'. Milestone 4 (RIGHT): Customer icon insurance company, Task tag 'AI 嵌进客服工作流', Layer created VS Code plugin icon 'a2ui-opencode', Text below 'UI 要能定制，不动 OpenCode 核心', Timeline date marker 'Day 32-90'. BOTTOM LAYER — A bold horizontal bar labeled '通用 agent 产品 = 3 层基座' showing the 3 layers stacked. CENTER ARROW connecting milestones to layers showing '客户需求 → 基座沉淀' flow. STYLE: Warm cream paper background (#F5F0E8), black hand-drawn sketch lines (2-3px, slightly irregular), soft pastel brand colors. Clean horizontal timeline with milestone dots. Minimal Chinese labels, simple line icons. NO dark backgrounds, NO 3D, NO realistic people. Subtle ArchAIHarness watermark bottom right. Landscape composition, 16:9 ratio.
image: /Users/weizuxiao/Documents/studio/03-内容创作/看懂AI与智能体/assets/24_FDE实战交付通用agent产品/01-4-customer-journey.png

prompt: Create a hand-drawn educational architecture diagram showing the 3-layer universal agent base that emerged from real FDE delivery. TITLE at top: '通用 agent 产品 · 3 层基座' in Chinese. MAIN LAYOUT — Three layers stacked vertically (like a layered cake cutaway), each layer with its purpose, key tech, and a small customer scenario icon. LAYER 1 (BOTTOM, warm brown #D4A574 base color): Title '运行环境', Icon Docker container + code-server logo + OpenCode logo, Repository 'build-on-vscode-opencode-image', Key value '客户机器装不上 → docker run 就跑', Bottom callout 'seed-if-absent：业务配置不被覆盖'. LAYER 2 (MIDDLE, sage green #85BAA1): Title '资源调度', Icon K8s icon + subdomain icon + TTL clock icon, Repository 'agent-gateway', Key value '一人一实例 + 自动回收 + 子域名隔离', Side callout 'Java + Spring Cloud Gateway + Redis'. LAYER 3 (TOP, soft blue #7BA7C9): Title '交互定制', Icon VS Code icon + plugin icon + UI customizer icon, Repository 'a2ui-opencode', Key value '客户工作流不同 → 插件层定制', Top callout 'OpenCode 提供 AI / VSCode 提供 UI / 客户填业务'. RIGHT SIDE — A timeline arrow showing emergence order: 客户 2 → Layer 1 (image), 客户 3 → Layer 1 + 2 (image + gateway), 客户 4 → Layer 1 + 2 + 3 (image + gateway + a2ui). BOTTOM ANCHOR: '基座不是设计出来的，是被客户砸出来的' in a yellow sticky-note style box. STYLE: Warm cream paper background (#F5F0E8), black hand-drawn sketch lines (2-3px, slightly irregular), soft pastel brand colors per layer. Each layer separated by a clear horizontal divider. Tech icons minimal and consistent. Minimal Chinese labels, simple line icons. NO dark backgrounds, NO 3D, NO realistic people. Subtle ArchAIHarness watermark bottom right. Landscape composition, 16:9 ratio.
image: /Users/weizuxiao/Documents/studio/03-内容创作/看懂AI与智能体/assets/24_FDE实战交付通用agent产品/02-three-layers-base.png

prompt: Create a hand-drawn educational comparison diagram showing what FDE actually delivers vs what engineers think they deliver. TITLE at top: 'FDE 真正的交付物：不是代码' in Chinese. MAIN LAYOUT — A vertical split comparison. LEFT SIDE (灰色, somewhat dimmed) — '工程师写出来的东西': A stack/tower of code artifacts: Python icon .py 脚本 (读 PDF 抽数据), Docker icon Dockerfile (环境打包), Java icon .java 类 (K8s 控制器), TS icon .ts 源码 (VS Code 插件). 底部标签 '代码量 = 几百到几千行'. 注释 '工程师觉得：我把代码交给你了，任务完成'. MIDDLE BAR — Bold red ≠ symbol with text '客户买的不等于这个'. RIGHT SIDE (warm color, prominent) — '客户能用的产品': Three hand-drawn cards stacked, each a deliverable the customer pays for. Card 1 (top, orange #E8A87C): '打开浏览器，AI 就在那', 小图标 browser + AI icon, 含义 '零安装、零配置、开箱即用'. Card 2 (middle, green #85BAA1): '提需求，下周就能用', 小图标 calendar + checkmark, 含义 '快速迭代、按周交付'. Card 3 (bottom, blue #7BA7C9): '业务变了，AI 跟着变', 小图标 gear + AI icon, 含义 '可定制、可扩展、可演进'. 底部标签 '客户买的不是 .py / .java / .ts / Dockerfile'. 注释 '客户买的是：能用的产品 + 持续的演进能力'. BOTTOM ARROW + BANNER: '代码写到 git 那一刻只是中间产物。客户真的开始用，那才是交付完成。' With a key icon next to the word 交付完成. STYLE: Warm cream paper background (#F5F0E8), black hand-drawn sketch lines (2-3px, slightly irregular), LEFT side in muted gray tones to feel less important, RIGHT side in warm pastel brand colors to feel important. Split clearly with the bold red ≠ symbol in middle. Minimal Chinese labels, simple line icons. NO dark backgrounds, NO 3D, NO realistic people. Subtle ArchAIHarness watermark bottom right. Landscape composition, 16:9 ratio.
